entities.name: Barbarus
entities.raw_quote: Barbarus [est] magnus comes et dux, et apparet in signo Sagitarij siluestris

entities.name: Cason
entities.raw_quote: Cason magnus dux est et fortis... Habet sub se xlv legiones.

entities.name: Otius

attributes.appearance: deterrimam hominis speciem, sed cum suscipit formam humanum habet dentes magnos et tria cornua

entities.raw_quote: Otius magnus preses et comes [est], et apparet in signo Vipere

entities.name: Cvson
entities.raw_quote: Cvson magnus rex est et fortis, et apparet in similitudine hominis.

entities.name: Alugor
entities.raw_quote: Alugor magnus dux est. Apparet in similitudine militis pulcherrimi

entities.name: Taob
entities.raw_quote: Taob magnus est et princeps. Apparet in signo medici

entities.name: Volach

attributes.appearance: in forma pueri, et habet alas ad modum angeli

entities.raw_quote: Volach magnus preses est. Apparet [in forma] pueri, et habet alas ad modum angeli.

entities.name: Gaeneron
entities.raw_quote: Gaeneron dux est fortis et potens, et apparet in similitudine pulcherrime mulieris.

entities.name: Tvueries
entities.raw_quote: Tvueries marchio magnus et fortis [est], regnans et imperans in Afforanisr partibus.

entities.name: Hanni
entities.raw_quote: Hanni preses magnus [est], et apparet in flamma ignea

entities.name: Svcax
entities.raw_quote: Svcax magnus marchio est, et apparet in similitudine hominis.

entities.name: Mirror Information Ritual

attributes.method: Circulate cemetery, collect stones from Psalm 50, make circle with verbena, use mirror traced with olive oil and thumb

entities.raw_quote: Postea accipe speculum, et line ipsum cum oleo oliue cum pollice

entities.name: Bel and Ebal Ritual

attributes.method: Write names on a rib (costa), place in fire, burn during high heat/fury

entities.raw_quote: scribe in costam nomen tuum et mulieris, Bel et Ebal... et pone ad ignem et fac cremari costam

entities.name: Generic Conjuration Preparation

attributes.method: Draw three circles; first in name of Father, second with Tetragramaton (West), Adonay (North), Sabaoth (South); third with Holy Spirit. Use thurible with incense and myrrh.

entities.raw_quote: Et faciat cum eodem cultello exteriorem circulum... incipit: Per corroboratum et potentissimum nomen dei El

entities.name: Cultellus (Knife)
entities.raw_quote: habeat cultellum cum manubrio albo uel nigro

summary: This chunk contains several distinct magical operations: a ritual for obtaining information via a mirror, a list of various demons and their attributes/legions, a ritual for obtaining a woman's love using burning ribs, and a generic method for conjuring spirits using circles and specific divine names.
key_passages: Postea accipe speculum, et line ipsum cum oleo oliue cum pollice
Barbarus [est] magnus comes et dux, et apparet in signo Sagitarij siluestris
scribe in costam nomen tuum et mulieris, Bel et Ebal... et pone ad ignem et fac cremari costam
habeat cultellum cum manubrio albo uel nigro, in cuius lamina hec nomina ex utraque parte sunt scripta: Agla [et] Sabaoth
inposito thureg et mirra, [et] circuash exteriora circuli
